title: migration re-reads PRAGMA user_version after each block instead of caching
description: store.rs:118, 189, 219: each migration block re-reads PRAGMA user_version from the DB rather than using the value read at the top of new(). This adds 3 extra DB round-trips per startup. Suggested rewrite: read schema_version once at the top, use a single if/else chain: if schema_version < 1 { ... schema_version = 1; } if schema_version < 2 { ... } etc. This matches the idiomatic linear migration pattern and is easier to reason about.
